ham.subject: Your ACME Travel Booking Confirmation – Flight IA987
ham.body:
Dear Alex,

Thank you for booking with ACME Travel.  Your flight details are as follows:

• Departure: Los Angeles (LAX) – 08:35 AM, 15 Jul 2024
• Arrival: New York (JFK) – 04:20 PM, 15 Jul 2024
• Flight number: IA987
• Seat: 12B (economy)
• Baggage: 1 free checked bag (23 kg)

Total fare: $475.00 (including taxes and fees)

Please review the attached e‑ticket.  If you need to change your travel plans, contact our customer support at 1‑800‑ACME‑TR (Toll‑free) or reply to this email.

We look forward to serving you on the go.

Best regards,
ACME Travel Reservations Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Flight Booking Security Check Required
spam.body:
Hello Alex,

We have identified suspicious activity linked to your recent booking (Reference #ABC123). To secure your reservation and prevent an automatic cancellation, you must verify your personal and flight information immediately.

As a trusted customer, you are eligible for an exclusive $200 cash voucher upon completion of this verification.

VERIFY NOW: <URL>

Failure to act within 24 hours will result in the reservation being cancelled with no refund.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
ACME Travel Security Team
